channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: The US has 10 days — 133 replies — 532.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 133 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:32 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61951218
>>61951189
Already know that, retard, and it changes nothing.

The FED Chair has significant influence and can convince other governors and regional presidents to align with his vote. Opposition is uncommon.
There are already a few members that are aligned with Trump's preferences.

Trump also replaced the BLS commissioner.

61951230
>>61951218
The Fed Chair only has the influence he can create, there will be no rate cuts

61951231
>>61938502
> advantage of the already strapped consumer yet again
I am a fan of the growing wealth gap

61951744
>>61938502
It does though. Many American allies, especially in Asia, depend on ME oil and are not likely to be happy about America slamming their economies into recession. And there are American allies in the ME that are dependent on their oil exports and they are already getting fucked. Do you think Arab countries that hate Israel to begin with are going to stand still for having America fuck them over for the benefit of Israel? Countries like the UAE are in dire straits already. They have 100 billion dollars in US treasuries. Think they won't dump them on the market?

61951852
>>61951156
waiting on the Fed, job numbers, regular babble etc

"one of them faggots"
stick your job numbers in your apple pie

61953180
You were warned. It only goes up from here. Literally no cap

61953280
>>61942683
Iran has satellite intel and radar, retard.

61953304
>>61938345
he cannot TACO out of this one because even if he withdraws, Iran will not stop

61953334
>>61938425
the ""elites"" do not really care, because it's not like it's them who suffer.
as long as there's still tax revenue going on, they'll be fully unaffected. if they do insider trading (they do), a crisis that fucks everyone over even benefits them.

61953343
>>61940570
It's literally construction crane not some advanced tech

61953401
>>61953280
It doesn't though.

61953413
>>61938425
Anyone earning above $250k doesn't really care if gas prices go up. Only poorfags genuinely get affected by it.

A rich person can go from spending $80 to fill up to $160, and if they make more than a million, that's like paying .80¢ vs. $1.60. For a poorfags, that's a death sentence since you can't shoplift gas, and you WILL get fired for not showing up to work, not being able to afford to fill up is not an excuse.

61953438
>>61938354
>sell S&P500
got it, senpai
but what are doing with settlement fund
>Crude Oil ETF's
>Gold
>Bitcoin
>cash under a mattress

61954094
>>61938341
>bond yields soar
Hmm so does the inflation act as some kind of price setter, allowing bond investors to indirectly collude and oush the bond interest rate up?

61954103
>>61938341
TDS was an underreaction

61954104
>>61953401
Ok, they are targeting US bases with nothing then

61954112
>>61954103
Trump's making me rich. I'll fill in his name on the ballet out of respect in 2028.

61954125
>>61953334
>elites will prob do insider trading
damn the case for taxing them somehow grows even stronger
>>61953413
Perhaps this will make EVs popular
(although getting your own solar is still costly)

61954255
>>61938341
The natural consequences of enabling the criminality of the US and Israel regimes

61954296
>>61954104
They aren't targeting shit anymore, and haven't been since the 2nd day. They're just tossing out the occasional ballistic missile or drone and hoping they hit something.

61954410
>>61953401
>It doesn't though.
Russia does

61954417
>>61938617
>>most are underway with progressing ETAs
Lol no, almost all tankers (of all types) and cargo ships are anchored.

61954440
>>61938528
so delusional. as someone who actually works in this business, that's not the type of thing that just bakes out risk for carriers. fucking idiot. they'll be taking the long way, trust me.

61954495
One of the things that is probably the most over right now is everything.

61954516
A right now everything is over just flew over my house

61955316
>>61954417
Chinese ships are getting through

61955417
The night before the new 1929 crash

61955547
>>61938341
>10 days
markets are crashing right fucking now

61955763
>>61954125
Tax credits for EVs. Just in time for the oil crisis.

item.content:encoded:
GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!! GOYIM!!!!! DJT

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:40 UTC

OP

GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!!

GOYIM!!!!!

DJT

Early replies (first 3)

61954017
>>61954004
BIDENS OIL

61954029
>>61954004
that kid should have practiced his aim a bit more

61954034
>>61954004
I voted for this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61955381
>>61955335
So what's next? Chemical weapons on Iran?
Kidnapping Iranians and torturing them cartel style and streaming the torture videos across the internet to piss them off? Bomb another school and hospital?

61955407
>>61955335
If they chant death to america in Afganistan, would you go back in?
What a childish way of thinking. They chant something so we have to kill their children.
America deserves a bloody nose from this, fuck you guys

61955418
>>61954918
Honest answer:
Because Trump was preaching keeping us out of wars (like Ukraine and others), fixing the economy at home, and getting rid of criminal illegals. All of which Americans wanted. And then somehow, some way, he got surrounded by evangelikikes and jews who promptly convinced him he had a holy mission to start WW3. He doesn't have a base now. Those who voted for him are disgusted with him. And everyone in the country is now going to be impacted economically because of him. Republicans don't have to worry about the midterms, they already lost big time.

61955421
>>61954004

61955438
sorry goys, trump wont end the war until bibi wants

61955448
>>61955335
>Iran is our enemy by their own choice

Oh? Iran controls US policy and social structure? Funny, I could have sworn that was Jews.

>Chant about destroying the great Satan

America is objectively satanic in the way they bombed and killed a bunch of school children, yes. America is Satanic in the way they allow the synagogue of Satan (jews) to run America, yes.

Iran didn't do anything to me. They didn't influence American culture for the worse. They don't have NGO's set up to flood America with minorities from other countries. They don't have the biggest proportion of leading feminists in America. They don't hate Christ and think he's boiling in shit. That's all jews.

Maybe think about who's causing America's issues.

61955451
>>61955381
>>61955407
Sure I mean if your entire country is built on the idea of destroying America nobody here is going to care what we do to you

Iran volunteered. They're not the only ones but everyone gets their turn being bombed and invaded

61955455
>>61954004
Why is this faggot speaking like Marco Pierre White

61955480
>>61955451
Your entire country is build on the idea that jews are superior people and your degenerate culture should be exported by force if needed.
9/11 2.0 can't come soon enough

61955494
>>61955480
I love foreigners telling me what my country is

Thanks

61955499
SOMEONE NEEDS TO STOP THIS FUCKING ORANGE RETARD RIGHT NOW

AAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

61955501
>>61954731
Iran won't concede but they would probably agree to a cease fire. Iran could get concessions for it, but the reason they might not demand them is that they feel time is on their side. They can build more launchers, make them more resilient. Rush to a bomb if they still have their HEU.
Trump probably won't try this shit again with them. Earliest would be after the midterms and Democrats are sure to win that and will be giving him all sorts of headaches for the remainder of his term.

61955508
>>61955494
Your president is on Netanyahu's leash and Hegseth routinely says he wants the third temple built and how jews are Gods chosen people.
Iranian culture is not as disgusting as yours

61955585
>>61954918
Burgers are terminally retarded.
That's the grim truth. 80 IQ fucktards.

61955609
>>61955508
He's not my president and by this time next year he's going to be in court fighting to stay in office.

Despite that I don't care what he does to the government of Iran. They certainly deserve it

61955615
There is literally no amount of money I would pay to save the life of a single Israeli

61955693
I voted for this btw, also I'm trans btw

61955711
>>61954918
Trump himself has said all polls are just made up

61955712
ok then wheres my oil stimulus check you billionaire retard faggot kike

61955720
>>61954029
kek

61955730
>>61955407
>If they chant death to america
wasn't just that, and here's my full sapport america saar screed and you should read it

iran's first act of foreign diplomacy after the revolution was to kidnap american citizens and hold them hostage for over a year. then an explicitly iranian backed jihadi group blew up like 200 US marines (and 50 french soldiers) in lebanon like 5 years later

the 80s through 90s were pretty much iran and its puppets either just killing or blackbagging several dozen american citizens, prominent officials etc and making them disappear in some iranian guantanamo never to be seen again. this is the metric their military is essentially built around post iran-iraq war, is to pull off shit like this. bit more anecdotally too, so fair enough if you don't wanna take this at face value, but imo plenty of americans who actually fought in the gwot are supportive of the war in iran, because it was iranian backed militias that were kidnapping american building contractors in iraq and turning their buddies into spaghetti bolognese

iran's entire mode of operation is to organise petty, criminal acts of terror with no regards to the outcome. its just totally self indulgent too. which makes the retardation of october 7th and the subsequent flattening of gaza that much more grim because they gave netanyahu the perfect opportunity to grab clay for israel, avoid jail AND destroy hezbollah as well. now they're even taking clay in southern lebanon lmao. ffs, australian intelligence even found out IRGC figures were paying drug dealing muslim bikers to organise firebombings on synagogues in australia. this was only found out because the bikers themselves were hiring methed out junkies who were occasionally hitting the wrong buildings entirely

iran is a sad fucking joke of a country. if anyone deserves a bloody nose, its iran and unironically i hope america pulls a carthage delenda est on the place. or at least a total purge of the batshit insane government.

61955753
>>61955730
I gave pretty much this exact same lesson to my kid last night. Well said

I don't have to support trump or israel to hate iran. Hating Iran is just one of the very few things I happen to agree with trump and israel on.

61955770
>>61955753
You're genocidal you want to kill 90 million people.
You have to be a human to see how that's bad, it's too bad you kikes aren't human.
I'm waiting to see the next war crime you can come up with to shock the world.
You killed 200 little school girls for absolutely no reason.
I wonder how you'll top that, I have 100% faith you will top it because you have unlimited capacity for evil.

61955773
>>61954140
trump is pathologically incapable of asking for and listening to advice
He didn't know or care about the strait, so no plan was made or considered

61955782
>>61955770
I'm not jewish

I do know muslims love to kill kids and then put their dead bodies around bomb sites

or hide soldiers in hospitals and schools.

you muslims are the very worst killers and liars out there and everyone knows it

61955784
>>61955730
You're an israeli kike who wants greater israel at all costs and you want to kill 500 million middle easterners to do it.
Public opinion is turning against Israel, that's why you want to use america to its fullest by destroying the entire middle east as well as the world economy. Oil is 120 dollars per barrel because of you, you disgusting rat.

61955785
>>61954918
there is a group of Americans who will pay any price and suffer any humiliation so long as it leads to at least some ethnic cleansing of the united states

61955798
>>61955730
iran sounds based af.
death to america.
fuck claps!
total mutt genocide!

61955809
>>61955782
I'm sure Iran is hiding soldiers under every school and hospital. I wonder how you can go further than that. You jews killed 200 school girls day 1.
I guess you could do it again, but the second time it'll have less shock value.
Trump wants to pull out of Iran, but you jews love genocide so much, you'll keep him in.

61954949
>>61954806

I told you people his policy is “Mass Confusion”. He started doing it day one after sucking up to neocons din’t work in his first term. Pay attention to what he does, not what he says. When I saw him moving ships to the Persian gulf I invested in oil tanker stocks right away.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61954986
>>61954806
The only way this ends is with either orange nigger nuking all of Iran or US sending him and his family to be hanged by mullahs in Tehran

61954989
>>61954806
what does tacos have to do with the markets?

61955357
>>61954806
He went all in, past the no return point. Now, he has to end with Iran, or Israel will cease to exist. And our good gueri tzebek can't afford that.

61955363
oil top right now 118.82

this is apocalyptic

61955373
>>61955357
he has to, 118.82 on a fucking sunday was beyond the worst case scenario. he needs to make a deal overnight now. truce or some shit.

61955488
>>61955373
I don't think you understand.

Every American unit in the ME could ceasefire, every ship could turn back, and not a plane could go into Iran. It doesn't matter, since Israel says it won't stop and Iran says it won't stop.

Orange man killed ANYONE and EVERYONE that had any sort of authority to end the war on Iran's end. They'll have to eliminate every single unit either through air power or boots on the ground.

America bombed a people that had trained CHILDREN to run across minefields to clear them. Why do they think they were going to surrender?

61955519
>>61954806
Israel will just hit Iran again

61955551
>>61955519
And accomplish what exactly? destroying Iran's oil and refinery does nothing but drive prices up even higher.

61955553
>>61955488
>end the war on Iran's end
simple solution kill the Israelis too

61955565
>>61954989
trump always chickens out

61955571
Holy shit you dumb faggots if he was going to TACO it was 2 weeks ago. We are pas the two weeks, IT IS HAPPENING, chudda was wrong.

You cannot simply 'taco' your way out of a closed strait, ruined oil infrastructure and an iran that is about to finish their nuke and drop it right on Rome as a fuck you to europe.

61955577
>>61955551
It's not about oil, it's about greater israel. It's about judeochristian values of killing everyone.

61955723
>>61955577
Yeah your right about Isreal. bibi's political party Unironically has drooling retards how think crashing the global economy and fighting "gog and mog" to the point of ruin will bring the mosiach

61955742
>>61954806
He wants to TACO, he's probably legit terrified from how this whole thing turned out and is probably having the mother of all crashouts behind closed doors. Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.

But he can't at this point, any backing out will basically be handing over the entire ME and doom the petrogoybux. And yes I'm scared because I honestly don't see a way out that isn't extremely bloody and costly

61955747
He only chickens out when he is based he doubles down when he is cringe.

61955766
>>61954806
just sell your shit and buy oil nigga

61955788
>>61954989
Taco because Trump Always Cucks Out

61955790
>>61955742
>Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.
This isn't something you realize 3/4 of the way through your presidential terms. You either know immediately on day 1 when they put your balls in a vice or never.

61955792

item.title: How high will OIL go? — 33 replies — 56.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
How high will OIL go?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:06 UTC

OP

150?
200?

Early replies (first 3)

61950050
>>61949961
The Trump admin probably starts trying to implement price controls above $150.

61950059
>>61949961
10,000 Gold.

61950077
How will crypto perform without rate cuts in the next 3 years?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950083
>>61950059
Eoy yes

61950184
>>61949961
That's Tehran right? So all those oil tanks were holding the oil that Iran was using to pay for those non-working radars and anti-ship missiles. Winnie the Pooh won't be happy about that.

61950223
I knew I should have bought an oil container when it was like 2.50 a gallon a little while ago but I had no idea how that would even work

61950468
>>61949961
The only thing keeping oil high is insurance companies. When they start insuring again oil will be flowing through the Strait again and oil will hit its top next week.

61950713
>>61949961
Alright, let's look at where this might go...

1973 Oil Crisis:

In March 1974, OAPEC lifted the embargo, but the price of oil had risen by nearly 300%: from US$3 per barrel to nearly US$12 per barrel globally. Prices in the United States were significantly higher than the global average.

- $3 -> $12 = 400% increase

- In today's dollars: $22.91 -> $83.76, 365.6% increase (which coincidentally also shows how retarded the way the gov calculates inflation is)

1979 Oil Crisis:

In January 1979, the U.S. crude oil first purchase price was approximately $9.46 per barrel. "Starting with the Iranian revolution, the price of crude oil rose to $39.50 per barrel over the next 12 months (its all-time highest real price until March 3, 2008)."

- $9.46 -> $39.50 = 417.5% increase

- In today's dollars: $45.05 -> $157.06, 348.6% increase

Oil's lowest price per barrel over the past year was $56.52, occurring on Dec 19th, 2025. If we multiply that by 400% we get a potential $226.08/barrel.

The price per barrel three weeks ago before it was completely obvious that the US was committed to attacking Iran was $60.71/barrel. 400% × $60.71 = $242.84/barrel.

61950718
>>61950184
The chinese tech from 2004? Imagine using that
>>61949961
They sell like 85% of that oil to middlemen who then sell the oil to China so not a big deal

61950728
>>61950713
(cont.)
A study recently done by Kansas State University found:

"Longer term, the price increase could be 4.2 cents per gallon for every dollar per barrel"

$226 × $0.042 = $9.49/gallon
$243 × $0.042 = $10.20/gallon

If we take the lowest percentage (bent by the gov's inflation calculator) of 348.6% and multiply that by the lowest price per barrel in the past year of $56.52, we get $197.03/barrel translating to $8.28/gallon.

Problems with stocking up on gas right now:

The gasoline supply in the US will remain the winter formulation until the beginning of May. Winter gas has a higher Reid Vapor Pressure (RVP), meaning it evaporates more easily than summer gas. This is less conducive to long-term storage. While people often claim that the RVP is so the gas ignites easier in winter, in reality the different formulation is mostly due to cost and air pollution concerns - in the winter, you can get away with cheaper formulations because the cold temps lead to less air pollution. Being more stabile, summer gas is better for storage any time of the year. Fuel stabilizers don't really improve this particular aspect of winter gas.

Various taxes, regulatory measures and subsidized incentives may also be implemented. Towards the end of the Carter administration, domestic oil was reduced to about 1/5th the global price per barrel through various measures including a windfall profit tax on oil companies which basically erased their profit margins from the high global prices keeping oil prices in the US for US use lower than elsewhere in the world. In 1980 the US imported about 40% of the oil it used so this didn't lower the price of gas by 4/5ths, but it did blunt the price felt by consumers. These efforts resulted in the price of gas only doubling instead of quadrupling. If gas prices only doubled from their pre-war average of ~$2.90/gal we'd see ~$5.80/gal.

61950790
>>61950728
>If gas prices only doubled from their pre-war average of ~$2.90/gal we'd see ~$5.80/gal.
a literal nothingburger.

BUYING GAS IS THE CHEAPEST PART OF OWNING A CAR!

61950801
>>61950728
>$8.28/gallon.
I checked and its higher then that in Germany.

61950847
>>61950801
My math was for the US only. As the world's largest producer of oil and now an oil exporting country, we have it better than most other countries.

61950857
>>61949961
No one cares about oil prices anymore, chud.

61950868
>>61950790
Driving a little gasoline Toyota Corolla 100,000 miles @ 40mpg and $5.80/gal: $14,500

Driving a larger electric Toyota bZ4X 100,000 miles at 252 miles per charge and $15/charge: $5,952

Look at what happened to the motor vehicle market after the 1973 and 1979 oil crises. Definitely not a nothingburger for investors.

61950872
>>61950857
Didn't Tesla stop making cars?

61950875
>>61950872
>tesla is the only ev maker
>>61950868
>still not owning an ev

61951080
>>61950184
>non-working radars
Funny that you say that

61951096
>>61949961
What oil stock do I buy bros????

61951236
>>61951080
Here is a real image, unlike your lazy well poisoning attempt
https://edition.cnn.com/2026/03/05/middleeast/radar-bases-us-missile-defense-iran-war-intl-invs

61951283
>>61949961
What will happen on Monday bros..?

61951306
>>61951283
Oil go up

61951325
>>61949961
At this point, over 300. Short term I'm guessing around 150.

61951346
>>61949961
I still don't understand why Americans give a blood sacrifice to Israel every 10 years. Is it some sexual thing?

61951350
>>61949961

This is the biggest oil production cut in the history of mankind. I don’t think an initial spike to $300 before face melting deflation kicks in is out of the question

61951441
>>61951346
It is a sexual thing and it's on tape.

61952245
>>61950875
>still not owning an ev

In the 90s and 2000s my dad was 100% against cell phones, despite cell phones having been around in some form since the 70s. He grudgingly finally got one for business around 2010. Now he doesn't have a home landline. You'll huff and puff for another decade while the world moves on from internal combustion vehicles, but you'll eventually own one like everyone else. Every oil crisis has accelerated the replacement of less efficient vehicles with more efficient vehicles, and we've maxxed out the efficiency of gasoline engines. New battery technology is already doubling range and longevity while halving charge time over what was possible just a couple of years ago. People are running out of excuses to avoid EVs and reasons to keep ICEs. So, you can be the modern equivalent of a guy in the 1930s still riding a horse into town and rejecting those new fangled automobiles, but from an investor standpoint EVs and the technology surrounding them are where the growth is and will continue to be. Personally, I look forward to a world without jeet-owned gas stations and white trash greasemonkey youtube slop.

61952254
>>61951441

oh vey

61952315
>>61952245
Yeah you want overpriced golf carts with planned obsolescence instead. Such an improvement!

61952559
>>61950713
>>61950728
Based and rare high analysis anon, Im doing an investigation currently myself but it’s difficult without drawing from past source’s because the current MSM story is far removed from reality even from a cursory glance. Need to keep eyes on the situation as it unravels, but it seems you’re indicating that this is more than a short spike and could be a year long event?

61954746
>>61950868
Spend an extra $20,000 on a car to save $8548 on gasoline

yore a geneos dude

61955625
>>61949961
it was about -$40 a few years ago so I'm guessing it might reach $3.50 soon

item.title: HOLY FUCK HERE COMES THE BIG ONE >$65,000 — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

bro its going ~40k until its going 0

61953694

i am 50k in the hole in one day!

why did i ever invest in btc??

61955636

it's already been backed up and added to my permanent archive

61955642
>>61953368
biblical crash tomorrow

Nikkei already down 4000

it is FUCKING OVER LOL

END OF THE AMERICAN EMPIRE

61955745
>>61953368
$65,000 is still waaaaaaaaaaaaayyyyy too much for digital nothing. needs to drop another -99% from there

61955779
Nothing is happening.

item.title: There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around — 11 replies — 39.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:24 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61952823
>>61952797
is this another one of those tricks where India becomes Southern Asian becomes Eastern Europe?

61952844
>>61952797
Ok, but why are both decreasing?

61952879
>>61952844
it looks to me that there are less Tech workers in general, the ones going back to Europe probably couldn't get a job in the US

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61952881
>>61952844
job postings fell on both sides of the atlantic after the post-covid boom
as for the US, the tech sector is really dominated by a couple of enormous tech companies that buy up small ones and streamline them (fire people). europe is currently in a tech boom in the start up phase, and then finding investment problems when they want to scale up. that has everything to do with the very fragmented market in europe and how very conservative europe is when it comes to investing. most loans go via banks rather than investors. europeans are able to save a lot of their income but they do not like to put their money in stocks, despite the very low rates on saving accounts.

61952901
>>61952881
>europeans are able to save a lot of their income

61954083
>>61952797
unskilled techies going to the poorfag continent because they can't compete with our AI

61954096
>>61954083
>our
do you own the business? or are the prices you pay as a saas consumer (lmao) going down?

61955274
More brown immigrants..

61955533
Ukraine and Russia hiring Indians after killing or scaring away their own people.

61955722
>Sending in all the saars to Europe
Pretty based tee bee haych. We should help them with a one-way ticket to the whitest europe countries left remaining

61955732
>>61952797
>better women
>better food
>better culture
yeah

item.title: Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all… — 50 replies — 36.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all…

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-09 02:19 UTC

OP

Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all of crypto history?
I presume the Hormuz straight is open or its opening will be forthright.

Early replies (first 3)

61950228
>>61950220
does any actually care about trump's tweets anymore? or even think he's funny anymore? or is op just being a stupid fag? first term, sure. but this term he is just cringe and gay.

61950235
if Steiner attacks, everything will be alright.

61950239
>>61950228
>I totally vooooted for Trump first term but now I am a pissed off former MAGA
This bot spam is as obvious as a yt comment section when you post the same thing over and over. This thread is about crypto.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61951313
>>61950220
European "leaders" of the nowadays are completely indefensible.
I say that as a European, that unfortunately lives in a EU nation.
Starmer, Sanchez, Macron, Merz...it's all the same bunch, that constantly makes decisions against the best interests of their people.
...and then they act surprised, that the oppositional parties are rising, which is ADANGERTOOURDEMOCRACY. No, it's simply FAFO and you will FO, whenever the voters get to make a choice.

61951335
>>61950947
This. And Trump has made that obvious to everyone with more than a few functioning brain cells.

61951336
>>61950228
He's rambling like a madman, they need to get him off the internet, its retarded that POTUS is talking shit on other countries 24/7.

61951363
>>61951313
The opposition parties are secretely the same bunch of assholes. They don't care about the people or interests of the nation, they just want to be the ones in charge who get all the sweet bribes just like the current leader. It's two sides of the same coin situation and any politician with the will to actually go against the system is immediately called a russian agent and ostracized from politics.

61951396
>>61951363
Farage, LePen and Weidel would be a much-needed upgrade for Europe. (No idea who that would be in Spain, but I didn't know Sanchez either until he declared to give hundreds-of-thousands of refugees the Spanish citizenship, so they can freely relocate within the EU.)
And as long as the establishment doesn't get them banned for wrongthink, they will probably rule in due time.
Unlike the usual Socialist/"""Conservative""" revolving door-style change-of-government, they are distinctly different, which is why they attract so much use of governmental power against them. The parties-of-old genuinely fear them.
Obviously can't vouch 100% for them, but they look like the only way out of this mess for Europe.

61951439
Americans are so fucking stupid. They deserve everything coming to them

61951451
>>61951091
Lmao obsessed mutt.

61951456
>>61950220
it's funny because mutts mocking europoors for being slave imigrants cucksuckers, yet they have pedo president who starts blasting wars left and right, just to cover up his "love" to children. Amerimutts, say hi to your pedo jewish overlords.

61951458
>>61951396
Kek what mess? The mess of Russia not being able to just invade countries it desires, and the mess of USA not being able to just dictate what europe does? It’s funny how you chuds are simply too stupid to see your own benefit, instantly falling to foreign propaganda. Both Russia and USA want to see the EU gone, but this doesn’t raise any questions in your retarded brain?

61951481
>>61951456
>assertions without proof
Nice fanfiction. Meanwhile there's literal videos of Biden molesting children on camera and you shills say nothing. Hypocrites.

61951489
>>61951481
The Dow is at 50k and trump wants to bang is own daughter and definitely diddled kids on Epsteins island .

61951493
>>61951458
(Among other things) the mess of uncontrolled mass migration. The people of the European nations are decisively against it.
Their only option on the ballot to stop that are the aforementioned oppositional powers, because the parties-of-old stand united against their people.
Now, make no mistake, I live in a town that has been having a large number of non-European foreigners since the late 60s/early 70s.
Even the migrants from back then have had it with the newer migrants (especially since 2015, but also since Bulgaria and Romania became EU nations).
They do not learn the local language, they can not provide for themselves, they are disproportionally criminal and some of them even hate the local people.
The parties-of-old (and the EU under their unchecked control) will fight for these guys to the blood. What the flying fuck do they expect the voters to do in light of that? The parties-of-old are the extremist forces, not the ones trying to represent the will of the people.

61951509
>>61951493
I agree that migration needs to be regulated but it’s no excuse to fucking dismantle all of europe and leave it naked for other great powers.

61951513
>>61951509
It's not about "dismantling Europe", though.
It's about turning the EU into a Europe of sovereign nations, so that the people are back in control instead of a completely detached "elite" in Brussels, that is effectively entirely unaccountable.

61951518
>>61950239
bad case of TDS (trump dicksucking syndrome)

61951603
>>61950947
That is correct. But it also has one master.

61951606
>>61951603
The master is just the biggest parasite.

61951633
How is this not bullish?

61951910
>>61950947
strange thing to call your jewish overlords parasites. Kek

61951932
>>61950850
do you also laugh at the absurdity of another man's dick entering your ass in an ironic and non-gay manner?

61951967
Taco incoming

61952008
>>61951091
>US should be carpet bombing european and EU govts and Israle, not iran
*Ftfy

61952070
>>61951458
The fact that you're posting about EU rather than your own actual country is already proof that your country is such a mess you don't even want to be associated with it. You have to group dozens of failed countries together to make something resembling a powerful entity and you think nobody's noticing what you're doing. You're the only one not noticing.
A decade ago "EU nationalists" like you didn't exist, now they're in every thread. That's how bad things have gotten on the level of individual EU countries

61952104
>>61951967
I can definitely sense hes going to cuck out way before the given timeline and randomly declare victory after oil reaches a certain price, maybe $120. That jew-owned cumslut always does this

61952110
>>61951633
>mutilized

61952147
>>61951458
These politicians had over 10 years to realize the US and Russia aren't friends and do something about it and they did jack shit. The current mainstream parties aren't worth it, they are useless.

61952325
>>61950220
Can we track when his faggot son sells his oil options?

61952521
I guess it is just dipping before the post-war momster pump.

61952903
>>61950220
>this said by the USA the country that swooped into ww2 after it was nearly over and everyone was tired
Ironic as fuck.

61955201
>>61950220
Errr that was awkward

item.title: Iran won't diddle the strait of Hormuz with naval mines, right? — 7 replies — 28.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Iran won't diddle the strait of Hormuz with naval mines, right?

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:32 UTC

OP

Iran won't diddle the strait of Hormuz with naval mines, right? America has only 3 SDF vessels in service...
https://www.chosun.com/english/world-en/2026/03/04/GSFYBQLNMNCJHJVQO5HYIOOACY/

Early replies (first 3)

61955514
hehe thanks for the tip dumb infidel

61955523
>>61954926
you need a real ship to mine. checkout WW2, the germans laid a bunch of joke mines before every uboat lane was filled with so many mines they couldn't leave.

61955540
Consider the following:
Modified Shahed to drop naval mines in the sea.
Or heck, to become the mines themselves

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61955549
>>61955523
NO YOU DO NOT. YOU CAN MINE THE STRAIT WITH FUCKING SPEED BOATS. WHERE THE FUCK ARE YOU GETTING THIS INFO?

61955581
WHO THE FUCK IS TELLING PEOPLE THAT THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS NO BIG DEAL? I KEEP ENCOUNTERING PEOPLE ON HERE THAT THINK IRAN CAN'T STOP SHIPS FROM GOING THROUGH. THAT THINK IRAN CAN'T JUST MINE THE FUCK OUT OF IT WITH SPEED BOATS OR SEND MISSILES/DRONES/WHATEVER AT TANKERS. THEY ABSOLUTELY CAN AND WILL DO ALL OF THAT. IT'S THE BIGGEST SINGLE RISK WITH ATTACKING IRAN, WE'VE ALWAYS KNOWN THIS WHICH IS WHY WE DIDN'T DO IT FOR DECADES. THERE IS NO SOLUTION. WE COULDN'T STOP FUCKING EVEN THE FUCKING HOUTHIS FROM CLOSING RED SEA TRAFFIC NO MATTER HOW MUCH WE BOMBED THEM

61955591
What are they going to mine it with, drones? The strait is full of american navy vessels. They should have done it before the war started.

61955764
Coast guard sweeps for mines during any naval missions they are the most elite team the actual tip of the spear. It would be very dumb for Iran to engage them. But they will like get engaged anyway.

item.title: Certified Banger Money Farming — 11 replies — 17.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Certified Banger Money Farming

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:02 UTC

OP

What are some methods, from which you have actually seen returns from, to make money outside of a day job
Side hustles, beer money, whatever you wanna call it, just name some good grinds out there that you could recommend to basically anyone
>Uhhhh just invest or hedge against some shitcoin
Not the point of the thread fuck off!
Mostly online methods preferred but not necessary (Yes I am aware some things take physical effort)
If it can be done both on a phone and PC even better
Personally I have been trying to form my own hustle for a little over a month now and have a subscriber base totaling $100 a month, not bad but nothing major

Early replies (first 3)

61952894
>>61952873
Indoor shrimp farming + Garloid wrangling

61952930
>>61952873
knee pads

61952932
>>61952930
overused joke

61955807

item.title: Literally MFW I am just gonna buy the dip, wait, and reap all the rewards It's called investing kid, read up on it — 7 replies — 6.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Literally MFW I am just gonna buy the dip, wait, and reap all the rewards It's called investing kid, read up on it

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-03-09 02:36 UTC

OP

Literally MFW I am just gonna buy the dip, wait, and reap all the rewards
It's called investing kid, read up on it

Early replies (first 3)

61955022
>>61954966
I just DCA regardless of what's going on.

61955047
>>61955022
not bad either, but you are missing potential upside
that being said, waiting forever for a dip and never buying in is also retarded

61955063
>>61955047
I also have cash for a lump-sum, but I only will do that if the market crashes more than 20%.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61955098
No, that's trading if you are trying to time it. Investing is just DCA at payday, like the gentleman above said.

61955107
>>61955047
>>61955063
what would you buy? i just opened an IRA account i'm trying to learn everything

61955328
>>61955107
In my taxable account I only buy index funds covering large and mid cap companies with very low turnovers and very low fees.

My Roth IRA is more specialized and is where I'll have some sector focused funds or some small cap stocks.

61955378
>>61955098
It’s investing just with a certain timing

we're good, oil ain't going any lower. buy shorts on monday for free money.

61953753
>>61953747
wait this was on the 7th. fuck.

61953772
>>61953747
>Entry
>91.431
RIP Bozo. Bobo deserves to lose money.

61953786
I dont short thoughbeit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61953792
>>61953747
My mom just told me word from back home is that they're letting thirdie tankers through. Its only US and pissraeli vessels getting ganked.

61953812
>>61953792
You can go on maps right now and see that's a lie.

61953813
>whale
>2.8 million dollars
LOL

61953836
>>61953813
>gambles 3 millons
do you gamble 3 millons everytime, nigga?

61953904
>>61953747
remember when oil went negative
there is no limit to how high it can go shortterm either

61953933
1,000% chance this is a Trump insider who thought his whole “oil has stabilized” messaging would actually calm markets.

61953934
>>61953812
Those maps don't show ships with transponders turned off, also not even sure if thirdie tankers have transponders. There is such a thing as a darkfleet.

61953939
>>61953747
It's the cia isn't it

61953944
>>61953813
Traders who aren't retarded trade with 1 to 2% of their account.

61953954
>>61953747
One of my OIL longs has been taken out by the auto deleveraging system.
They won't let you win.

61953987
>>61953944
If you're going to spend $3 million it means you have money

The more money you have the smarter you are.

Look at Trump. A literal BILLIONAIRE and President of the Free Worlds. Smartest guy around.

61953998
>>61953792
Iran just blew up 3 tankers used by russia to circumvent sanctions, Iran's command structure is so fragmented the ground commanders have no idea who is who

61954000
>>61953747
>EVERYTHING WILL BE FINE AND OIL IS GOING DOWN.

61954011
>>61953747
He voted for it.

61954033
>>61953792

The most reliable of sources

61954037
>>61953747

61954038
>>61953747

>trading oil on a crypto exchange
literally a small fry in the world of commodity trading.

61954136
>>61953944
So it could just be a hedge and not an attempt at profit.

61954466
>>61953987
>destroys your entire argument by masturbating in public

61954473
>>61953747
ICEsisse cope!
EVChuds WON

61954504
>>61953934
>turning off a transponder makes your giant tanker ship invisible to drones

61954524
>>61953747
>120 usd/barrel
kek why are people panicking? that's not even close to the biggest jump in oil prices

61955056
Welcome to /pmg/ fuckers. It was a bank just shorting to suppress the spot price. It happens to bullion at 8am est daily and 5pm est Sundays

61955095
>>61954524
bro we're at 114 right now

61955194
>>61953747
What? $3 million position in oil isn't that the equivalent of me opening a $10 position in Nvidia?

61955211
>>61953747
KWABOTY

61955266
top reached

61955307
Looks like he was wrong.

Huh this dumbass thread was only 3 hours ago? Feels longer.

61955510
>>61955266
I just made 60,000 dollars on oil futures and I'm going to have 250k by the end of the week while you keep calling tops that never come.

61955569
>>61955056
/pmg/ here, you are fucking retarded. Do you really think a 2.8M short can have any impact on the largest commodity market in the world lol? Oil is the cornerstone of modern civilization, it's not something you can tank with a fucking 3M bet on binance lol. There is $30M worth of oil futes changing hands every second.

item.title: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHH — 46 replies — 35.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-03-09 02:22 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61953190
this man is on suicide watch >>61950166

61953192

my honest reaction
>how the fuck is it still below $200?

61953223

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61953349
108

61953385
NO CRYING IN THE CASINO

61953391
>>61953306

61953414
>>61953183
All three were at $103 at open for one some reason. I suspect somebody dumb just wanted to buy any oil for under $103 without thinking about which location they bought.

This brings me to the question of why Murban Crude is still being bought. If you have to get it delivered you have to figure out a way to get it out of the gulf.

Whoever bought it all for $103 might not have been thinking about transport.

61953450
>>61953183
>Their pumping OIL to keep LINK suppressed below $8.60

61953507
>>61953235

61953931

61953942

remember when oil went negative
there is no limit to how high it can go shortterm either

61954365

61954386

61954387

61954400

61954420

61954927

61954937
>>61954845
Every day that goes by the world gets to see more and more how nonthreatening and incompetent Iran always has been. They've been a fucking nothing burger ever since Israel has wanted us to go to war with them Their "big bad nuclear" program was bombed in a fucking day. Their leadership literally dies the second they promoted. Their "coup de grace" is bombing all of their allies more than the enemies who attacked them. The fate of their country now lies in the reliable hands of college protestors, they've not only lost but have branded themselves in shame for generations to come.
